_publications._publicationTitle: Neural Crest-Specific TSC1 Deletion in Mice Leads to Sclerotic Craniofacial Bone Lesion.

_contextSnippet: TSC1 protein in cell lysates prepared from the neural crest-derived nasal and frontal bones of CKO mice was reduced by 60% compared to CTR
details: Successfully detected 60% reduction in TSC1 protein levels in neural crest-derived bones of CKO mice compared to controls
